nasb.text: I will camp against you encircling you, And I will set siegeworks against you, And I will raise up battle towers against you.

esv.text: And I will encamp against you all around, and will besiege you with towers and I will raise siegeworks against you.

cnv.text: 我必四面安營攻擊你， 築起攻城的臺來圍困你， 堆起高壘攻擊你。

ccb.text: 我必把你团团围住， 屯兵围困你， 修筑高台攻打你。

csbs.text: 我要四周扎营攻击你， 用攻城塔围困你， 筑起高垒攻击你。
